title: CON EDISON TO REPORT 1ST QUARTER 2022 EARNINGS ON MAY 5
text: NEW YORK , April 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE:ED) plans to report its 1st Quarter 2022 earnings on May 5, 2022 after the market closes. Consolidated Edison, Inc. is one of the nation's largest investor-owned energy-delivery companies, with approximately $14 billion in annual revenues and $63 billion in assets.
